title: Map bass response to macro motion

tests.title: bass energy > 0 produces greater particle displacement than bass energy = 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
tests.description: Creates two identical particle fields from the same seed, runs one with bassEnergy=0 and the other with bassEnergy=0.8 over 5 frames. Measures cumulative per-frame displacement (to avoid toroidal wrapping artifacts) and asserts the bass-driven field moves more.
tests.strategy: Instantiate two ParticleField instances with the same seed and params. Iterate 5 frames, accumulating displacement between consecutive snapshots via computeTotalDisplacement(). Assert cumulativeWithBass > cumulativeNoBass.

tests.title: smoothed bass changes less frame-to-frame than raw bass with jittery input
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Response is smoothed to avoid jitter
tests.description: Uses the full render loop (startLoop) with a mock analyser pipeline that alternates frequency data between 200 and 50 each frame. Captures bassEnergy values from draw() calls and verifies the maximum consecutive frame-to-frame difference is below 0.4 (raw unsmoothed difference would be ~0.52).
tests.strategy: Mock requestAnimationFrame to drive 8 frames. Provide a mock pipeline whose poll() fills frequency with alternating high/low values. Spy on geometrySystem.draw() to capture params.bassEnergy per frame. Compute max consecutive diff and assert < 0.4.

tests.title: when pipeline reports all-zero frequency data (muted), bassEnergy is still > 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Effect remains visible when audio is unmuted or muted
tests.description: Uses startLoop with a mock pipeline whose frequency buffer is all zeros (simulating muted audio). Runs 5 frames at 1-second intervals. Asserts that at least one frame has bassEnergy > 0, confirming the synthetic bass fallback provides gentle macro motion even when audio is silent.
tests.strategy: Mock requestAnimationFrame for 5 frames with 1000ms spacing. Provide all-zero frequency pipeline. Spy on geometrySystem.draw() and extract bassEnergy values. Assert at least one value > 0.

tests.title: with maximum bass (255), all particle positions remain within 0-1 bounds after many frames
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.description: Runs a particle field at maximum bassEnergy=1.0 for 200 frames with large delta=50ms to stress-test bounds. Verifies every particle position remains within [0,1] after the run, confirming toroidal wrapping and clamping prevent out-of-bounds positions.
tests.strategy: Init ParticleField with bassEnergy=1.0, density=0.8. Run 200 draw() frames with delta=50. Snapshot positions and assert all x,y in [0,1].

tests.title: bass-driven motion respects prefers-reduced-motion (motionAmplitude=0.2 reduces displacement)
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
tests.description: Creates two particle fields with identical bass (0.8) but different motionAmplitude (1.0 vs 0.2). Runs 10 frames each and compares total displacement from initial position. Asserts the full-motion field displaces more than the reduced-motion field.
tests.strategy: Init two fields from same seed. Run 10 frames with motionAmplitude=1.0 and motionAmplitude=0.2 respectively. Compare displacement from initial to final positions. Assert dispFull > dispReduced.

tests.title: no forbidden storage APIs accessed during bass-driven rendering
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.description: Spies on localStorage.getItem, localStorage.setItem, document.cookie getter and setter. Runs 20 frames of particle field rendering with high bass, plus a mapSignalsToVisuals() call. Asserts none of the forbidden storage APIs were called.
tests.strategy: vi.spyOn Storage.prototype.getItem/setItem and document.cookie get/set. Run particle field draw() 20 times. Call mapSignalsToVisuals(). Assert all spies not called.

helpers.name: createTestCanvas
helpers.description: Creates an 800x600 canvas element and returns { canvas, ctx }

helpers.name: computeTotalDisplacement
helpers.description: Sums Euclidean distance between corresponding particle positions in two snapshots

implementationGaps: T-018-02 requires EMA smoothing for bass in renderLoop.ts (currently only treble is smoothed)
T-018-03 requires synthetic bass fallback in renderLoop.ts when frequency data is all zeros
